response.justification: Candidate is a strong generalist software engineer with deep experience in JavaScript/TypeScript, Node.js, and DLang, but the resume shows only a brief ~6-month C/C++ stint at National Instruments (2014-2015) and a bachelor thesis project. The role requires 5-10 years of hands-on C++ on Windows, SQL Server/Oracle, and capital markets / fixed income domain knowledge — none of which are demonstrated. Profile is misaligned with the mandatory requirements.
strengths: Long software engineering track record at reputable companies (Stripe, Shopify, Datadog)
Strong fundamentals in testing, TDD, CI/CD, and craftsmanship practices
Some exposure to C/C++ at National Instruments and via a wave field synthesis thesis project
concerns: Lacks the required 5-10 years of professional C++ development experience
No SQL Server or Oracle experience; databases used are MongoDB and MySQL
No fixed income, capital markets, or investment banking domain experience

key_factors.factor: No capital markets / fixed income domain background
Missing SQL Server / Oracle and Windows platform focus
